CustomField.formula: IF(SDR_Name__r.UserRoleId = "00Eb0000000i11v" , "SDR - Chat", IF(SDR_Name__r.UserRoleId = "00Eb0000000i120" , "SDR - Chat Manager", IF(SDR_Name__r.UserRoleId = "00Eb0000000aL6m" , "SDR - ENT", IF(SDR_Name__r.UserRoleId = "00Eb0000000aLOb" , "SDR - ENT Manager", IF(SDR_Name__r.UserRoleId = "00Eb0000000t99i" , "SDR - SMB", IF(SDR_Name__r.UserRoleId = "00Eb0000000aLOg" , "SDR - SMB Manager", NULL))))))
CustomField.label: SYS SDR Name Role
